testcase.classname: GET /api/v1/cart returns 401 when no token is provided
testcase.name: GET /api/v1/cart returns 401 when no token is provided

testcase.classname: GET /api/v1/cart returns 401 with a garbage token
testcase.name: GET /api/v1/cart returns 401 with a garbage token

testcase.classname: GET /api/v1/cart returns 200 with an empty cart for a newly registered user
testcase.name: GET /api/v1/cart returns 200 with an empty cart for a newly registered user

testcase.classname: POST /api/v1/cart/add returns 401 when no token is provided
testcase.name: POST /api/v1/cart/add returns 401 when no token is provided

testcase.classname: POST /api/v1/cart/add returns 401 with a garbage token
testcase.name: POST /api/v1/cart/add returns 401 with a garbage token

testcase.classname: POST /api/v1/cart/add returns 422 when productId is not a valid UUID
testcase.name: POST /api/v1/cart/add returns 422 when productId is not a valid UUID

testcase.classname: POST /api/v1/cart/add returns 422 when quantity is zero
testcase.name: POST /api/v1/cart/add returns 422 when quantity is zero

testcase.classname: POST /api/v1/cart/add returns 422 when productId is missing
testcase.name: POST /api/v1/cart/add returns 422 when productId is missing

testcase.classname: POST /api/v1/cart/add returns 404 when product does not exist
testcase.name: POST /api/v1/cart/add returns 404 when product does not exist

testcase.classname: GET /api/v1/cart/count returns 401 when unauthenticated
testcase.name: GET /api/v1/cart/count returns 401 when unauthenticated

testcase.classname: GET /api/v1/cart/count returns 200 with a count for an authenticated user
testcase.name: GET /api/v1/cart/count returns 200 with a count for an authenticated user

testcase.classname: PUT /api/v1/cart/item/:itemId returns 401 when no token is provided
testcase.name: PUT /api/v1/cart/item/:itemId returns 401 when no token is provided

testcase.classname: PUT /api/v1/cart/item/:itemId returns 401 with a garbage token
testcase.name: PUT /api/v1/cart/item/:itemId returns 401 with a garbage token

testcase.classname: PUT /api/v1/cart/item/:itemId returns 400 when quantity is missing
testcase.name: PUT /api/v1/cart/item/:itemId returns 400 when quantity is missing

testcase.classname: PUT /api/v1/cart/item/:itemId returns 400 when quantity is less than 1
testcase.name: PUT /api/v1/cart/item/:itemId returns 400 when quantity is less than 1

testcase.classname: PUT /api/v1/cart/item/:itemId returns 403 when item does not belong to the authenticated user
testcase.name: PUT /api/v1/cart/item/:itemId returns 403 when item does not belong to the authenticated user

testcase.classname: DELETE /api/v1/cart/item/:itemId returns 401 when no token is provided
testcase.name: DELETE /api/v1/cart/item/:itemId returns 401 when no token is provided

testcase.classname: DELETE /api/v1/cart/item/:itemId returns 401 with a garbage token
testcase.name: DELETE /api/v1/cart/item/:itemId returns 401 with a garbage token

testcase.classname: DELETE /api/v1/cart/item/:itemId returns 403 when item does not belong to the authenticated user
testcase.name: DELETE /api/v1/cart/item/:itemId returns 403 when item does not belong to the authenticated user

testcase.classname: DELETE /api/v1/cart/clear returns 401 when no token is provided
testcase.name: DELETE /api/v1/cart/clear returns 401 when no token is provided

testcase.classname: DELETE /api/v1/cart/clear returns 401 with a garbage token
testcase.name: DELETE /api/v1/cart/clear returns 401 with a garbage token

testcase.classname: DELETE /api/v1/cart/clear returns 200 for an authenticated user even when cart is already empty
testcase.name: DELETE /api/v1/cart/clear returns 200 for an authenticated user even when cart is already empty

testcase.classname: POST /api/v1/orders/create returns 401 when no token is provided
testcase.name: POST /api/v1/orders/create returns 401 when no token is provided

testcase.classname: POST /api/v1/orders/create returns 401 with a garbage token
testcase.name: POST /api/v1/orders/create returns 401 with a garbage token

testcase.classname: POST /api/v1/orders/create returns 422 when deliveryAddress is missing
testcase.name: POST /api/v1/orders/create returns 422 when deliveryAddress is missing

testcase.classname: POST /api/v1/orders/create returns 422 when deliveryCity is missing
testcase.name: POST /api/v1/orders/create returns 422 when deliveryCity is missing

testcase.classname: POST /api/v1/orders/create returns 422 when deliveryPhone is missing
testcase.name: POST /api/v1/orders/create returns 422 when deliveryPhone is missing

testcase.classname: POST /api/v1/orders/create returns 400 when cart is empty (all fields present)
testcase.name: POST /api/v1/orders/create returns 400 when cart is empty (all fields present)

testcase.classname: GET /api/v1/orders/my-orders returns 401 when no token is provided
testcase.name: GET /api/v1/orders/my-orders returns 401 when no token is provided

testcase.classname: GET /api/v1/orders/my-orders returns 401 with a garbage token
testcase.name: GET /api/v1/orders/my-orders returns 401 with a garbage token

testcase.classname: GET /api/v1/orders/my-orders returns 200 with pagination for a newly registered user (no orders yet)
testcase.name: GET /api/v1/orders/my-orders returns 200 with pagination for a newly registered user (no orders yet)

testcase.classname: GET /api/v1/orders/my-orders accepts optional status query param without error
testcase.name: GET /api/v1/orders/my-orders accepts optional status query param without error

testcase.classname: GET /api/v1/orders/my-orders accepts pagination query params without error
testcase.name: GET /api/v1/orders/my-orders accepts pagination query params without error

testcase.classname: GET /api/v1/orders/:orderId returns 401 when no token is provided
testcase.name: GET /api/v1/orders/:orderId returns 401 when no token is provided

testcase.classname: GET /api/v1/orders/:orderId returns 401 with a garbage token
testcase.name: GET /api/v1/orders/:orderId returns 401 with a garbage token

testcase.classname: GET /api/v1/orders/:orderId returns 404 for a non-existent order ID
testcase.name: GET /api/v1/orders/:orderId returns 404 for a non-existent order ID

testcase.classname: GET /api/v1/orders/:orderId returns 404 for a second distinct non-existent ID
testcase.name: GET /api/v1/orders/:orderId returns 404 for a second distinct non-existent ID

testcase.classname: PUT /api/v1/orders/:orderId/status returns 401 when no token is provided
testcase.name: PUT /api/v1/orders/:orderId/status returns 401 when no token is provided

testcase.classname: PUT /api/v1/orders/:orderId/status returns 401 with a garbage token
testcase.name: PUT /api/v1/orders/:orderId/status returns 401 with a garbage token

testcase.classname: PUT /api/v1/orders/:orderId/status returns 403 when a regular buyer attempts the status update (role-gated)
testcase.name: PUT /api/v1/orders/:orderId/status returns 403 when a regular buyer attempts the status update (role-gated)

testcase.classname: PUT /api/v1/orders/:orderId/status returns 400 when status value is not in the allowed list
testcase.name: PUT /api/v1/orders/:orderId/status returns 400 when status value is not in the allowed list

testcase.classname: PUT /api/v1/orders/:orderId/cancel returns 401 when no token is provided
testcase.name: PUT /api/v1/orders/:orderId/cancel returns 401 when no token is provided

testcase.classname: PUT /api/v1/orders/:orderId/cancel returns 401 with a garbage token
testcase.name: PUT /api/v1/orders/:orderId/cancel returns 401 with a garbage token

testcase.classname: PUT /api/v1/orders/:orderId/cancel returns 404 when attempting to cancel a non-existent order
testcase.name: PUT /api/v1/orders/:orderId/cancel returns 404 when attempting to cancel a non-existent order

testcase.classname: PUT /api/v1/orders/:orderId/cancel cancel request without a reason body still returns 404 for missing order
testcase.name: PUT /api/v1/orders/:orderId/cancel cancel request without a reason body still returns 404 for missing order

testcase.classname: GET /api/v1/orders/number/:orderNumber returns 401 when no token is provided
testcase.name: GET /api/v1/orders/number/:orderNumber returns 401 when no token is provided

testcase.classname: GET /api/v1/orders/number/:orderNumber returns 401 with a garbage token
testcase.name: GET /api/v1/orders/number/:orderNumber returns 401 with a garbage token

testcase.classname: GET /api/v1/orders/number/:orderNumber returns 404 for a non-existent order number
testcase.name: GET /api/v1/orders/number/:orderNumber returns 404 for a non-existent order number

testcase.classname: GET /api/v1/orders/store/:storeId (seller/admin only) returns 401 when no token is provided
testcase.name: GET /api/v1/orders/store/:storeId (seller/admin only) returns 401 when no token is provided

testcase.classname: GET /api/v1/orders/store/:storeId (seller/admin only) returns 401 with a garbage token
testcase.name: GET /api/v1/orders/store/:storeId (seller/admin only) returns 401 with a garbage token

testcase.classname: GET /api/v1/orders/store/:storeId (seller/admin only) returns 403 when a regular buyer tries to access store orders
testcase.name: GET /api/v1/orders/store/:storeId (seller/admin only) returns 403 when a regular buyer tries to access store orders

testcase.classname: PUT /api/v1/orders/:orderId/confirm-delivery returns 401 when no token is provided
testcase.name: PUT /api/v1/orders/:orderId/confirm-delivery returns 401 when no token is provided

testcase.classname: PUT /api/v1/orders/:orderId/confirm-delivery returns 401 with a garbage token
testcase.name: PUT /api/v1/orders/:orderId/confirm-delivery returns 401 with a garbage token

testcase.classname: PUT /api/v1/orders/:orderId/confirm-delivery returns 404 for a non-existent order
testcase.name: PUT /api/v1/orders/:orderId/confirm-delivery returns 404 for a non-existent order

testcase.classname: POST /api/v1/auth/register registers a new user and returns 201 with a token
testcase.name: POST /api/v1/auth/register registers a new user and returns 201 with a token

testcase.classname: POST /api/v1/auth/register returns 400 when registering a duplicate email
testcase.name: POST /api/v1/auth/register returns 400 when registering a duplicate email

testcase.classname: POST /api/v1/auth/register returns 422 when email is invalid
testcase.name: POST /api/v1/auth/register returns 422 when email is invalid

testcase.classname: POST /api/v1/auth/register returns 422 when password is too short
testcase.name: POST /api/v1/auth/register returns 422 when password is too short

testcase.classname: POST /api/v1/auth/register returns 422 when name is missing
testcase.name: POST /api/v1/auth/register returns 422 when name is missing

testcase.classname: POST /api/v1/auth/login returns 200 with token on valid credentials
testcase.name: POST /api/v1/auth/login returns 200 with token on valid credentials

testcase.classname: POST /api/v1/auth/login returns 400 on wrong password
testcase.name: POST /api/v1/auth/login returns 400 on wrong password

testcase.classname: POST /api/v1/auth/login returns 400 for non-existent email
testcase.name: POST /api/v1/auth/login returns 400 for non-existent email

testcase.classname: POST /api/v1/auth/login returns 422 for missing email
testcase.name: POST /api/v1/auth/login returns 422 for missing email

testcase.classname: GET /api/v1/auth/me returns 401 when no token is provided
testcase.name: GET /api/v1/auth/me returns 401 when no token is provided

testcase.classname: GET /api/v1/auth/me returns 401 with a garbage token
testcase.name: GET /api/v1/auth/me returns 401 with a garbage token

testcase.classname: GET /api/v1/auth/me returns 200 with valid token from a fresh registration
testcase.name: GET /api/v1/auth/me returns 200 with valid token from a fresh registration

testcase.classname: POST /api/v1/auth/logout returns 200 regardless of whether a token is provided
testcase.name: POST /api/v1/auth/logout returns 200 regardless of whether a token is provided

testcase.classname: POST /api/v1/auth/logout returns 200 and clears session with a valid token
testcase.name: POST /api/v1/auth/logout returns 200 and clears session with a valid token

testcase.classname: GET /api/v1/products/search returns 200 with results array for a basic query
testcase.name: GET /api/v1/products/search returns 200 with results array for a basic query

testcase.classname: GET /api/v1/products/search returns 422 when limit is out of range
testcase.name: GET /api/v1/products/search returns 422 when limit is out of range

testcase.classname: GET /api/v1/products/search returns 422 when offset is negative
testcase.name: GET /api/v1/products/search returns 422 when offset is negative

testcase.classname: GET /api/v1/products/store/:storeId returns 200 for any storeId (even nonexistent — returns empty list)
testcase.name: GET /api/v1/products/store/:storeId returns 200 for any storeId (even nonexistent — returns empty list)

testcase.classname: POST /api/v1/products returns 401 when unauthenticated
testcase.name: POST /api/v1/products returns 401 when unauthenticated

testcase.classname: POST /api/v1/products returns 401 with a garbage token
testcase.name: POST /api/v1/products returns 401 with a garbage token

testcase.classname: PUT /api/v1/products/:id returns 401 when unauthenticated
testcase.name: PUT /api/v1/products/:id returns 401 when unauthenticated

testcase.classname: DELETE /api/v1/products/:id returns 401 when unauthenticated
testcase.name: DELETE /api/v1/products/:id returns 401 when unauthenticated

testcase.classname: POST /api/v1/products — validation (no auth needed to see 422) returns 422 when storeId is not a UUID
testcase.name: POST /api/v1/products — validation (no auth needed to see 422) returns 422 when storeId is not a UUID

testcase.classname: GET / returns 200 with API live message
testcase.name: GET / returns 200 with API live message

testcase.classname: GET /api returns 200 with API metadata
testcase.name: GET /api returns 200 with API metadata

testcase.classname: GET /api/v1 returns 200 with endpoint list
testcase.name: GET /api/v1 returns 200 with endpoint list

testcase.classname: GET /api/v1/nonexistent returns 404 for unknown routes
testcase.name: GET /api/v1/nonexistent returns 404 for unknown routes

testcase.classname: GET /health returns a health object with expected shape
testcase.name: GET /health returns a health object with expected shape
